segments.text: Here's a foolproof plan on how to stay poor. One, don't start until everyone says it's a good idea. Two, tolerate mediocre people. Three, do what your
poor friends do and then expect to get rich. Four, assume that anyone who makes more money than you is somehow unethical. Five, think that you need to
start rich to get rich. Six, say, "I'm not a math person." And then forever think the fact that you had a bad eighth grade math teacher excuses you from
learning anything new. Most people already know what to do. They're just hoping there's an easier answer when there isn't
